name: @leing2021/pi-search
description_en: Minimal Secure Evidence Gateway for Pi Coding Agent — search, web_search, web_fetch, research_search. Intent-based provider routing, quota fallback, dual-LLM research, 4-layer abuse prevention.
description_zh: Pi Coding Agent 的最小安全证据网关 — search、web_search、web_fetch、research_search。基于意图的提供者路由、配额回退、双 LLM 研究、四层滥用防护。
